summary: Good-quality recording captures a stellar performance with standout Sugaree, Bird Song and an epic 20‑minute Playing in the Band.
review: The show is praised for its tight Sugaree and soaring Bird Song, and the second set delivers a monster >20‑minute jam on Playing in the Band. Reviewers call the recording great, noting no issues despite the lack of technical detail.

ai_rating.rationale: Enthusiastic 4‑star review highlighting strong performances and a generally good recording; limited data (single review) yields moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewer rates recording positively.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set solid with highlighted tunes, while the second set builds momentum and peaks with an epic >20‑minute Playing in the Band jam.
